## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] No paid product files added
- [ ] No private customer data added
- [ ] No mainnet gate weakened
- [ ] No investment / yield / price-target language
- [ ] Tests or rationale included
- [ ] Docs updated if status changed

## Mainnet impact

- [ ] No mainnet impact
- [ ] Mainnet-related but still gated
- [ ] Needs founder/security/legal/tax review
